description: HPCA Mode 6 evaluation manifest v2. Three-axis arm naming per docs/findings/hpca_naming_convention_v1.md: {selection}__{delivery}__{bandwidth_k}. See docs/findings/hpca_evaluation_plan_v1.md for the full phased plan and gates. All stages target the canonical config (1-core, L1=32KB/8w, L2=256KB/8w, L3=2MB matched per-core to DROPLET/GRASP).

profiles.smoke: Phase 1.3: 15-min toolchain end-to-end verification on email-Eu-core.
profiles.go_no_go: Phase 1.5: 1-2h GO/NO-GO gates before full sweep.
profiles.baselines: Phase 2: minimal baseline stability on common graphs.
profiles.buildup: Phase 3: incremental ECG build-up (selection axis sweep).
profiles.sensitivity: Phase 4: sensitivity sweeps (L3 size, bandwidth_k, dedup, delivery).

stages.name: smoke__baselines__no_prefetcher
stages.description: Smoke: replacement-only baselines (LRU/GRASP/POPT/ECG_DBG/ECG_POPT) on email-Eu-core/pr. Verifies all eviction policies load+run end-to-end.

stages.name: smoke__seq__sw__k16
stages.description: Smoke: DROPLET-style sequential prefetcher (k=16, paper-default lookahead) under ECG_DBG eviction. Tests prefetcher activation path.

stages.name: smoke__popt_off__isa__k2
stages.description: Smoke: HEADLINE arm - offline POPT-ranked per-edge mask + ISA-extension delivery + k=2 bandwidth (1 selected + 1 sequential). Tests CHARGED=0 env propagation.

stages.name: go_no_go__none__baseline
stages.description: GO/NO-GO baseline: no prefetcher, ECG_DBG eviction, on large graphs at L3={2MB,8MB}. REQUIRED for computing demand_misses_saved and saved/fill against the prefetcher arms below. Added per rubber-duck audit before launch.

stages.name: go_no_go__seq__sw__k8
stages.description: GO/NO-GO kill-switch 1A: DROPLET-style k=8 on large graphs at L3=2MB and L3=8MB. Baseline for the headline comparison. NOTE: requires ecg_pfx_lookahead=8 to propagate to roi_matrix (fixed in final_paper_run.py).

stages.name: go_no_go__seq__sw__k16
stages.description: GO/NO-GO kill-switch 1B: DROPLET-style k=16 (paper default) on large graphs at L3=2MB and L3=8MB.

stages.name: go_no_go__popt_off__isa__k2
stages.description: GO/NO-GO kill-switch 1C: HEADLINE arm on large graphs at L3=2MB and L3=8MB. Must beat seq__sw__k8 on demand_misses_saved AND total DRAM to pass on at least one cell.

stages.name: go_no_go__baseline_sanity
stages.description: GO/NO-GO kill-switch 2 (RELAXED per rubber-duck): baseline activity sanity check, not strict parity. Verifies all 5 replacement policies load, run, and report sane numbers (not strict equality with paper variants). Original GRASP=ECG_DBG parity was achievable; POPT=ECG_POPT_PRIMARY is not (ECG_POPT_PRIMARY adds DBG tie-break). Strict parity gates deferred to a separate audit phase.

stages.name: baselines__no_prefetcher
stages.description: Phase 2: replacement-only sweep on common corpus. 5 graphs x 5 eviction policies, no prefetcher.

stages.name: baselines__seq__sw__k8
stages.description: Phase 2: DROPLET-style k=8 baseline on common corpus under ECG_DBG eviction.

stages.name: buildup__popt_rt__sw__k1
stages.description: Phase 3a: ECG_PFX mode 2 - runtime POPT-ranked single best target from K=1 LH=8 lookahead window. Validates online lookahead can match DROPLET miss-rate at lower bandwidth.

stages.name: buildup__popt_off__isa__k1
stages.description: Phase 3b: ECG_PFX mode 6 (per-edge offline POPT) + ISA delivery + k=1 bandwidth. Tests the selection-quality value with minimum bandwidth.

stages.name: buildup__popt_off__isa__k2
stages.description: Phase 3c: HEADLINE ARM. Per-edge offline POPT + ISA delivery + k=2 (1 selected + 1 sequential = AMPLIFY=1 sweet spot).

stages.name: buildup__popt_off__sw__k2_negctrl
stages.description: Phase 3d (negative control): same as headline but with software-delivered mask (CHARGED=1). Must lose to headline to confirm the ISA-delivery contribution.

stages.name: sensitivity__l3_sweep__none
stages.description: Phase 4a: L3 size sweep on com-orkut + soc-LiveJournal1 (no prefetcher baseline). L3 in {1, 2, 4, 8, 16 MB} to validate 'advantage grows with L3' theory directly.

stages.name: sensitivity__l3_sweep__seq__sw__k8
stages.description: Phase 4b: L3 size sweep for DROPLET-style k=8 on com-orkut + soc-LJ.

stages.name: sensitivity__l3_sweep__popt_off__isa__k2
stages.description: Phase 4c: L3 size sweep for HEADLINE arm on com-orkut + soc-LJ. The 'advantage grows with L3' curve is the proof of the working-set theory.

stages.name: sensitivity__amplify_sweep
stages.description: Phase 4d: AMPLIFY sweep at canonical config (L3=2MB, com-orkut + soc-LJ). Per sprint 6f-7 Phase 2.6, expected to saturate at AMPLIFY=1 due to dedup window absorbing extras.
